stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA continues its dominance in AI chips amid surging demand, highlighted by an 11-day winning streak and 21% April gains. MSFT's early data center launch with NVDA GB200s signals massive capex. Economic implications include accelerated AI infrastructure buildout boosting GDP via tech investment. Market psychology: FOMO drives buying as AI narrative strengthens. Historical parallels: Cisco during dot-com boom. Analogies: Like the gold rush fueling mining stocks; NVDA as the pickaxe seller.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Chip rally reinforced by TSM earnings beat on AI demand (web_search); X sentiment positive on streaks and MSFT news (x_semantic_search). Sentiment shift upward amid records.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 8-12% gains targeting $215 short-term on momentum.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short below $190 for 5% downside if rotation to value.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Valuation bubble burst, supply chain disruptions from geopolitics, competition from AMD/Intel.

stocks.justification: Consistent AI tailwinds, strong technicals, ecosystem lock-in.

stocks.impact_theory: UBS upgrade to Neutral from Sell, calling TSLA 'leader in physical AI' amid robotaxi hype. Shifts sentiment from EV slowdown to autonomy/AI play. Economic: Accelerates shift to AV economy, potential trillion$ TAM. Psychology: Elon Musk halo effect reignites bulls. Parallels: 2020 post-split rally. Analogies: Like Amazon's AWS pivot from retail; Tesla from cars to robots.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Upgrade news (web_search, X posts); bulls eyeing $400+ (x_keyword_search). Positive shift despite volatility.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting $420 (8% upside) on AI narrative.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short on delivery misses for 10% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory hurdles for FSD, China competition, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Upgrade credible but execution risks remain.

stocks.impact_theory: Dramatic pivot from shoes to AI infra with $50M financing for GPUs; stock +582% then -22%. Econ: Desperate diversification into hot AI GPUaaS. Psych: Meme frenzy then reality check on dilution/no expertise. Parallels: SPAC pivots like Lordstown. Analogies: Like a lemonade stand buying Bitcoin miners; high-risk hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Post-rally drop on skepticism (Cramer blast, web_search); X mixed but vol high. Sentiment shift from euphoria to doubt.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid or scalp rebounds for 20% swings.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Further dilution, execution failure, regulatory scrutiny.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings beat with 50% profit jump, raised guidance on AI insatiable demand, more capex. Validates supply chain strength. Econ: Foundry monopoly fuels AI boom. Psych: Confirms NVDA/others demand. Parallels: 2023 AI surge start. Analogies: Like Aramco in oil era; essential pipe for chips.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings crush (web_search); X buzz on AI read-through. Major positive shift.

stocks.impact_theory: FDA reviewing peptides lifts restrictions, tailwind for weight loss/GLP offerings. Econ: Telehealth growth in wellness. Psych: Regulatory greenlight sparks optimism. Parallels: Ozempic boom for telemed. Analogies: Like Uber deregulation boost; unlocks product expansion.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: FDA news drives gains (web_search); positive X sentiment.
